revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:1 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:1月20日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 1월 20일]][[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:正月二十]][[zh:正月二十]]
{{Not to be confused with|January 20|qq=January 20}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=一月二十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 1월 20일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar January|qq=}} '''January 20''' is the 20th day of month {{ill|Zhengyue|en|Zhengyue|qid=Q1072983|lt=January (Mutsuki)|1=Zhengyue}}, the 1st month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Genryaku|de|Genryaku|ja|Genryaku|zh|Genryaku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genryaku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1184|en|1184|qid=Q19728|lt=1184|1=1184}} {{ill|March 4|de|March 4|ja|March 4|zh|March 4|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March 4|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|en|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|qid=Q1139202|lt=Minamoto no Yoshinaka|1=Minamoto no Yoshinaka}} fought against the forces led by {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|en|Minamoto no Yoritomo|qid=Q242800|lt=頼朝|1=Minamoto no Yoritomo}}’s order, along with {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|en|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|qid=Q310445|lt=義経|1=Minamoto no Yoshitsune}}, and was defeated and killed at Awatsuhara in Ōmi.{{Citation needed|date=2021-04|qq=}} * {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|qid=Q1145262|lt=Hōei|1=Hōei}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1709|en|1709|qid=Q6857|lt=1709|1=1709}} {{ill|March 1|de|March 1|ja|March 1|zh|March 1|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March 1|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ） – Ten days after the death of the shōgun, {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|en|Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|qid=Q313745|lt=Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|1=Tokugawa Tsunayoshi}}, the {{ill|Shōrui Awaremi no Rei|de|生類憐れみの令|ja|生類憐れみの令|zh|生類憐れみの令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōrui Awaremi no Rei|1=Shōrui Awaremi no Rei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10855187}} was abolished.
== Births == * {{ill|大歴|de|大歴|ja|大歴|zh|大歴|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/大歴|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 7th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|772|en|772|qid=Q30729|lt=772|1=772}} {{ill|February 28|de|February 28|ja|February 28|zh|February 28|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/February 28|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ） – {{ill|Bai Juyi|en|Bai Juyi|qid=Q313324|lt=白居易|1=Bai Juyi}} (also known as Hakuchūi, 白楽天) a poet of the {{ill|Tang dynasty|en|Tang dynasty|qid=Q9683|lt=Tang|1=Tang dynasty}} dynasty (died {{ill|846|en|846|qid=Q30454|lt=846|1=846}}){{Citation needed|date=2021-04|qq=}}. * {{ill|Hōreki|en|Hōreki|qid=Q1194397|lt=Hōreki|1=Hōreki}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1760|en|1760|qid=Q7646|lt=1760|1=1760}} {{ill|March 7|de|March 7|ja|March 7|zh|March 7|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March 7|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ） – {{ill|Matsura Seizan|en|Matsura Seizan|qid=Q6788220|lt=松浦静山|1=Matsura Seizan}}, a daimyo and the 9th head of the {{ill|Hirado Domain|en|Hirado Domain|qid=Q3034453|lt=Hirado Domain|1=Hirado Domain}} (died {{ill|1841|en|1841|qid=Q7622|lt=1841|1=1841}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1838|en|1838|qid=Q7612|lt=1838|1=1838}} {{ill|February 14|de|February 14|ja|February 14|zh|February 14|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/February 14|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ） – {{ill|Okada Izō|en|Okada Izō|qid=Q3058220|lt=Okada Iizō|1=Okada Izō}}, a gōshi (local samurai) of the {{ill|Tosa Domain|en|Tosa Domain|qid=Q1189704|lt=Tosa Domain|1=Tosa Domain}} from the late Edo period (died {{ill|1865|en|1865|qid=Q7708|lt=1865|1=1865}}). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1857|en|1857|qid=Q7680|lt=1857|1=1857}} February 14） – {{ill|Ueki Emori|en|Ueki Emori|qid=Q7204799|lt=Ueki Edamori|1=Ueki Emori}}, a leader in the 【Jiyū Minken Undō】 (Freedom and People's Rights Movement) and a member of the House of Representatives (died {{ill|1892|en|1892|qid=Q7839|lt=1892|1=1892}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genryaku|de|Genryaku|ja|Genryaku|zh|Genryaku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genryaku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1184|en|1184|qid=Q19728|lt=1184|1=1184}} {{ill|March 4|de|March 4|ja|March 4|zh|March 4|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March 4|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|en|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|qid=Q1139202|lt=Minamoto no Yoshinaka|1=Minamoto no Yoshinaka}}, a warrior (武将) (born {{ill|1154|en|1154|qid=Q19649|lt=1154|1=1154}}). * Genryaku 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} 1184, March 4） – {{ill|Imai Kanehira|en|Imai Kanehira|qid=Q3192618|lt=Imai Kanpei|1=Imai Kanehira}}, a warrior and one of the four commanders known as {{ill|Yoshinaka's Four Heavenly Kings|de|義仲四天王|ja|義仲四天王|zh|義仲四天王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshinaka's Four Heavenly Kings|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 源義仲|1=Minamoto no Yoshinaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1139202}} (born {{ill|1152|en|1152|qid=Q19645|lt=1152|1=1152}}).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Hatsuka Shōgatsu|de|二十日正月|ja|二十日正月|zh|二十日正月|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hatsuka Shōgatsu|1=Hatsuka Shōgatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11371391}}
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|1|19|1|21|12|20|2|1|0120|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ko:음력 1월 20일]] [[ja:1月20日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:正月廿]]
[[ar:January 20 (Lunisolar)]]
<!--1月20日 (旧暦)--> <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh:正月二十]] [[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:正月二十]] {{wikidata link|Q838892}} [[Category:Days 20 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar January]] [[Category:Tomobiki]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
